description: When reviewing a chunked diff, if chunk 1 succeeds but chunk 2 times out or errors, the session remains in status `in_progress` forever. Add failure handling in the multi-chunk loop in src/codex/client.ts (or wherever the chunk iteration lives after the wiring commit ce058b3) to mark the session `failed` on partial failure and propagate a useful error. Acceptance: test that simulates a mid-chunk timeout asserts session ends in `failed` state and review_status reflects that. Source: docs/roadmap_1.1.md:156.
title: Fix multi-chunk session orphaning on partial failure
